fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies an identification number for the entry or record.

fields.name: First Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's first name.

fields.name: Middle Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's middle name.

fields.name: Last Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's last name.

fields.name: Initials
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's initials.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's job title.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the employee.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's telephone number.

fields.name: Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's private telephone number.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's private email address.

fields.name: Alt. Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate address.

fields.name: Alt. Address Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date when the alternate address is valid.

fields.name: Alt. Address End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last day when the alternate address is valid.

fields.name: Birth Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's date of birth.

fields.name: Social Security No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the social security number of the employee.

fields.name: Union Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's labor union membership code.

fields.name: Union Membership No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's labor union membership number.

fields.name: Gender
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gender with which the employee identifies.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Emplymt. Contract Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employment contract code for the employee.

fields.name: Statistics Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a statistics group code to assign to the employee for statistical purposes.

fields.name: Employment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee began to work for the company.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employment status of the employee.

fields.name: Inactive Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee became inactive, due to disability or maternity leave, for example.

fields.name: Cause of Inactivity Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the cause of inactivity by the employee.

fields.name: Termination Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the employee was terminated, due to retirement or dismissal, for example.

fields.name: Grounds for Term. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a termination code for the employee who has been terminated.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a resource number for the employee.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment has been entered for this entry.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when this record was last modified.

fields.name: Extension
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's telephone extension.

fields.name: Pager
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's pager number.

fields.name: Company E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's email address at the company.

fields.name: Salespers./Purch. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a salesperson or purchaser code for the employee.

fields.name: Employee Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's type to link business transactions made for the employee with the appropriate account in the general ledger.

fields.name: Bank Branch No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number of the bank branch.

fields.name: Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number used by the bank for the bank account.

fields.name: IBAN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account's international bank account number.

fields.name: Balance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount the employee owes the company, or the company owes them. For example, for an overpayment, or for expenses, respectively. The word "balance" indicates the amount can be positive (employee owes the company) or negative (the company owes the employee).

fields.name: SWIFT Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the SWIFT code (international bank identifier code) of the bank where the employee has the account.

fields.name: Balance (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount the employee owes the company, or the company owes them in local currency. For example, for an overpayment, or for expenses, respectively. The word "balance" indicates the amount can be positive (employee owes the company) or negative (the company owes the employee).

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code that is inserted by default when you create entries for the employee.

fields.name: Application Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to apply payments to entries for this employee.

fields.name: Engagement Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Engagement Type field.

fields.name: Collective Bargain. Agmt. Info
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Collective Bargaining Agreement Info field.

fields.name: Board Member
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Board Member field.

fields.name: Manager Role
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Manager Role field.

fields.name: Payroll
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Payroll field.

fields.name: Payroll Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Payroll Currency Code field.

fields.name: Payroll (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Payroll (LCY) field.

fields.name: Nationality
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Nationality field.

fields.name: Working Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Working Type field.

fields.name: Working Hours
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the Working Hours field.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture of the employee.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Allow Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies if multiple posting groups can be used for posting business transactions for this customer.
